events.title: [TEST] Cacao + Sound Journey with Maya
events.description: A small Sunday-evening cacao ceremony followed by handpan and frame-drum sound journey. Held in an intimate studio in Penestanan. Open hearts, slow descent, optional sharing circle. Drop-in welcome, donations supported.
events.short_description: Sunday cacao + handpan + frame drum in Penestanan

events.title: ATV AND RAFTING ONEDAY TRIP
events.description:
ATV Extreme + Ayung River Rafting Experience

Get ready for an adrenaline-filled adventure combining Extreme ATV ride and Ayung River Rafting in one thrilling day.

Ride your ATV through waterfalls, mud tracks, jungle trails, caves, and rivers, then continue the excitement with a scenic rafting journey on the famous Ayung River.

Choose between:

 
 Single ATV + Rafting (1 person / 1 ATV)

 
 
 Tandem ATV + Rafting (2 persons / 1 ATV)

 

The distance between the ATV starting point and rafting location is only 30 minutes, making the experience smooth, efficient, and perfectly planned.

Perfect for groups, couples, and adventure seekers looking for a full-day Bali thrill. 

CONTACT US THROUGH WHATSAPP : +6281339158661

events.title: CBC — Contact Beyond Contact
events.description: A healing dance journey for body, mind & soul. CBC blends Authentic Movement, Contact Improvisation, and gentle psychosocial exploration—inviting you to soften, tune in, and reconnect. A space held with intention: Small, intimate group, Clear and respectful boundaries, No dance experience needed. Come exactly as you are—no roles, no expectations. Just you, your body, and the moment.
events.short_description: A healing dance journey blending Authentic Movement and Contact Improvisation to reconnect with yourself.
